channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Tuesday, February 24
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 07:16 PM (1.703 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 03:18 AM (-0.365 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: N 8 mph
